title: TN Elections: PIL in Madras HC to bar candidates not professing Hinduism, Sikhism or Buddhism from SC seats
description: A public interest litigation has been filed before the Madras High Court seeking directions to ensure that only those professing Hinduism, Sikhism or Buddhism are permitted to contest elections from constituencies reserved for the Scheduled Caste (SC) communities [Arjun Sampath Vs Chief Electoral Officer]The plea, moved by Hindu Munnani leader Arjunan Sampath has sought a direction to the Chief Electoral Officer and all returning officers in Tamil Nadu to strictly scrutinise nomination papers fo
